questions.question: Which backup/DR concept best matches: process of creating copies of data for recovery needs?
questions.explanation: Backup is defined as: process of creating copies of data for recovery needs.

questions.question: What is the most accurate description of 'Backup'?
options: ordered sequence of systems restored based on business impact
process of creating copies of data for recovery needs
backup containing changes since last backup of any type
step-by-step operational guide for recovery execution
questions.explanation: Backup refers to: process of creating copies of data for recovery needs.

questions.question: 'Backup' belongs mainly to which backup/disaster recovery area?
questions.explanation: Backup is mainly part of Backup Fundamentals.

questions.question: Identify the correct backup/DR term-definition mapping.
options: Backup -> process of creating copies of data for recovery needs
Retention Period -> process of creating copies of data for recovery needs

Warm Site -> process of creating copies of data for recovery needs
questions.explanation: Only 'Backup -> process of creating copies of data for recovery needs' is correctly mapped.

questions.question: A Bank SO IT resilience requirement states: process of creating copies of data for recovery needs. Which concept should be selected?
questions.explanation: The requirement directly points to Backup.
